name: Orbital Drift
objective: Navigate a spacecraft through orbital paths without crashing. Survive as long as possible.
controls: Arrow Keys or WASD to steer. Space may activate thrust or special abilities.
win_condition: Survive for as long as possible and reach the highest distance or score.
avoid: Colliding with asteroids, debris, or other orbital bodies.
tips: Look for a Start or Play button on the menu. During gameplay the ship moves continuously — steer carefully. After game_over, a Retry or Play Again button should appear.
